title: Creating reoccurring items WITH subitems
excerpt: Can this be done? Ive already created automation for single items reoccurring on a daily, weekly, and monthly basis. I don’t see any functionality to do this with items that have subitems?

posts.author: thazen (Tyler Hazen)
posts.cookedHtml: Can this be done? Ive already created automation for single items reoccurring on a daily, weekly, and monthly basis. I don’t see any functionality to do this with items that have subitems?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Tyler! This isn’t supported in the automations yet, unfortunately. However, you could set an automation for “When item is created, create subitem”. Would this work or are you looking more to duplicate the items and their subitems?
